name: Place into
syntax: Place the text [Data] into the text field named [Target].
description: Moves strings or numerical data into a designated user interface text field.
example: Place the text "Hello World" into the text field named "OutputField".

name: Move to coordinates
syntax: Move the [Object Type] named [Name] to the coordinates [X], [Y].
livecode_equivalent: set the loc of [Object Type] [Name] to [X],[Y]
description: Changes the physical screen location of a specified user interface element.
example: Move the button named "Submit" to the coordinates 100, 200.
